positive: A mystical, intricate cosmic mandala design centered on a crescent moon cradling bioluminescent stylized flora. The composition must feature strong, clean silhouettes of abstract plant life and swirling nebulous elements, set against a deep indigo void. Use highly contrasting colors: brilliant neon teal, vibrant amethyst purple, and luminous gold accents. The style should be a blend of sacred geometry and Art Nouveau celestial themes, rendered with clean vector line work and perfect symmetry, optimized for screen printing on fabric. Central, impactful, highly detailed, ethereal, transcendental art.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, messy, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, gradient, photorealism, grayscale
